name: lv-book-tour
description: Book one or more tours. villageName is optional — omitted uses LEVANDE_DEFAULT_VILLAGE_NAME if set, else first village in the store. tourDate/tourTime optional when omitted: LEVANDE_DEFAULT_TOUR_DATE + LEVANDE_DEFAULT_TOUR_TIME if both set, else next Sydney calendar day at 10:00. Optional storePath.

villageName.description: Optional. If omitted, uses LEVANDE_DEFAULT_VILLAGE_NAME or the first village in the store.

phone.description: Australian mobile: 04XXXXXXXX or +61 4XXXXXXXX (spaces/dashes ok), e.g. 0406910251 or +61406910251.

tourDate.description: Optional for book-only flows. If omitted with tourTime, see tourTime. If both omitted with tourTimes, use arrays. If all omitted, default slot (env or next Sydney day 10:00).

tourTime.description: Optional with tourDate for book-only flows. If both date and time are omitted, a default slot is used.

tourDates.description: Parallel with tourTimes; a single string counts as one slot.

tourTimes.description: Parallel with tourDates; a single string counts as one slot.

implicitTourSlot.description: True when tourDate/tourTime were omitted and a default slot was applied.

implicitSlotAdjusted.description: True when the default slot was already taken and the next free day at the same time was used.
